svg.aria-label: Andamio credential — Your First Midnight DApp (Midnight Project-Based Learning)
svg.metadata: { "@context": [ "https://www.w3.org/ns/credentials/v2", "https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/ob/v3p0/context-3.0.3.json", "https://credentials.andamio.io/context/v0.jsonld" ], "type": [ "VerifiableCredential", "OpenBadgeCredential" ], "issuer": "did:web:credentials.andamio.io", "name": "Your First Midnight DApp", "credentialSubject": { "type": [ "AchievementSubject" ], "achievement": { "type": [ "Achievement" ], "name": "Your First Midnight DApp", "description": "Your First Midnight DApp \u2014 Midnight Project-Based Learning" } }, "andamio:course": "Midnight Project-Based Learning", "andamio:onChainAnchor": { "network": "mainnet", "courseId": "dd29e3da6227720a8600a41c95e4f40e74785e2831da036ac95843ff", "sltHash": "9125935c77db7eb50b6521b69abb4264ee2bbdc083227429e7c68b5abdc48325" }, "andamio:theme": { "deep": "#0E0A1F", "ink": "#15112B", "raised": "#201A3C", "prim": "#8B6CF0", "prim_lt": "#B9A6F7", "sec": "#E86CA8", "sec_lt": "#F2A6CC", "bone": "#ECE7F2", "slate": "#7A7196", "hair": "#2E2A4A", "core1": "#FFFFFF", "core2": "#F6F3FE", "itext": "#15203A", "imuted": "#5C6680", "iline": "#E5E9F0", "extlabel": "#7A7196", "slt_label": "#E86CA8", "ev_label": "#E86CA8", "ctitle": "#3A3065", "mtitle": "#5B304B" }, "_note": "Presentation artifact.
